title: NV Access - NVDA Screen Reader
description: Free, open-source screen reader for Windows. Essential for accessibility testing.

title: VoiceOver User Guide (Apple)
description: Official Apple documentation for VoiceOver on macOS, including web navigation commands.

title: WebAIM: Screen Reader User Survey
description: Annual survey data on screen reader usage, preferences, and trends from real users.

title: NVDA Keyboard Shortcuts
description: Comprehensive NVDA keyboard shortcuts guide from beginner to expert.

title: VoiceOver Web Navigation Cheatsheet
description: WebAIM guide to testing web content with VoiceOver on macOS and iOS.

title: JAWS Screen Reader
description: Industry-standard commercial screen reader for Windows, widely used in enterprise.

title: WAI: How to Test with Screen Readers
description: W3C guidance on evaluating web accessibility, including screen reader testing methodology.

title: Deque: Screen Reader Testing Guide
description: Practical guide for testing web content with screen readers from Deque Systems.

title: Accessibility Support Database
description: Database of real-world screen reader and browser support for HTML and ARIA features.

title: TetraLogical: Screen Reader Guides
description: Professional guides to screen reader testing including setup scripts and testing templates.
